clusters.justification: This cluster reflects the macro-level processing of emotional valence, physiological arousal, and mood, underpinned by shared co-activation within cortical and subcortical salience and limbic networks.
These terms map onto frontostriatal and dopaminergic reward circuits dedicated to the overarching computation of subjective value, incentive motivation, and reinforcement-based decision making.

These concepts reliably engage the default mode network, forming a macroscopic functional axis dedicated to processing abstract internal models of the self and navigating interpersonal or social representations.
